headlines.title: British Steel set to be nationalised, Starmer says
headlines.description: The steelworks has been under government control for almost a year, but leglistation to nationalise it will be put forward this week.

headlines.title: British passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship isolating in hospital
headlines.description: The passengers landed in the UK on Sunday and none have reported symptoms, but they will will be monitored in hospital for 72 hours.

headlines.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
headlines.description: Iran is reported to want lifting of the US naval blockade, recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for war damage.
